name: A chance to save her life
description:
You wake up in the day your girlfriend took her own life, you have one more chance to avoid it.

TW: Depression, suicide, loss, grief.

It's been so long that you don't even remember her face, but you remember that day, she acted distant and harsh, and you both fight. It's not the best last memory.

And you still remember her last text she sent you, you were the last person she texted and talked.

You have lived with the weight of knowing that you could have done something to prevent what happened, until one day the world gave you the opportunity to prove whether you really could have been able to save her.

This is your only chance, good luck.

Extra images:

Here

Here

And here

So, I really felt in the mood to do a really sad bot, but at least you can have a happy ending in here.

Man, I like writing sad things but I kind of felt bad writing the backstory of this.

But anyway, that's all I have to say, save her.
creator: Stays
